title: Plavin 6

{{Quote|''[…]'' I know of several smugglers and thieves who have made Plavin 6 their temporary home, searching for Dr. Llalik. So far, no one has seen anything out of the ordinary.|Credman, ''Gundark's Gear Datalog''|<ref name="Gundark">''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]''</ref>}}
'''Plavin 6''' was a [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] whose native inhabitants preferred to wear loose-fitting [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] [[Nashiak Llalik]] and [[Saren Llalik]]. Nashiak eventually became a renowned [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] and built a large [[Nashiak Llalik's mansion|mansion]] on Plavin 6, where he stored two incomplete prototypes of the [[Sunder 9]] [[Power armor/Legends|power armor]] suit. At some point, a number of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and [[Thief/Legends|thieves]] set up residence on the world in order to locate Nashiak.

==Description==
Plavin 6 was a [[Water/Legends|humid]] [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] that occupied the sixth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="AIR" /> in the [[Plavin system/Legends|Plavin system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="TEA Plavin" />

==History==
[[File:Nashiak_Llalik.png|thumb|right|300px|Doctor Nashiak Llalik hailed from Plavin 6 and maintained a large mansion there.]]
Plavin 6 was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of<ref name="AIR" /> [[Human/Legends|Humans]]<ref name="AIR" /><ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref> [[Nashiak Llalik]] and [[Saren Llalik]], who were respectively the second [[Gender/Legends|son]] and daughter of the [[Doctor/Legends|doctors]] [[Nash Llalik|Nash]] and [[Loran Llalik]]. While they were still [[Youngling/Legends|children]], Nashiak would read stories about historical [[Armor/Legends|armor]]-donning military organizations and tell his family, including Saren<ref name="AIR" />—who was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]<ref name="CROdate">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', which establishes [[Saren Llalik]] to be thirty-two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, is set during the time shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], therefore placing her [[Reproduction/Legends|birth]] around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref>—about the armor that their members wore. At some point, Nashiak attended and graduated from the [[Chandrilan Academy of Sciences]]<ref name="AIR" /> on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]].<ref name="SoR">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref>

Doctor Nashiak Llalik became a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-renowned [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] affiliated with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], whereas his sister and [[Unidentified Llalik child|older brother]] both became members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Hoping to someday retire to a quiet life on Plavin 6, Llalik used his wealth to build a large [[Nashiak Llalik's mansion|mansion]] there. At the mansion, he stored two incomplete prototypes of the [[Sunder 9]] [[Power armor/Legends|power armor]] suit that he had been designing before being forced to put off his work.<ref name="AIR" /> On the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[4 ABY/Legends|39:8:4:90]], the [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] [[Collector/Legends|collector]] known as "[[Credman]]" noted in a comment in the illegal database ''[[Gundark's Gear Datalog]]'' that they were familiar with several [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and [[Thief/Legends|thieves]] who had set up temporary residence on Plavin 6 while unsuccessfully attempting to locate Llalik.<ref name="Gundark" />

==Inhabitants==
Native inhabitants of Plavin 6 mostly preferred to wear loose-fitting [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]]. Doctor Nashiak Llalik, a native of Plavin 6, loved his homeworld.<ref name="AIR" /> A number of smugglers and thieves also resided there while searching for Llalik.<ref name="Gundark" />

==Locations==
Plavin 6 was the site of a large mansion owned by the engineer Doctor Nashiak Llalik. There, in a [[securi-vault]], he stored a pair of prototype Sunder 9 power armor suits that were guarded by a personal [[Security guard/Legends|security]] detachment.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Plavin 6 was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Plavin [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world itself, in grid square L-9.<ref name="TEA Plavin" />
